---
title: "The relationship between Gross Domestic Product per capita and Life Expectancy."
author: "Emma Rand"
engine: knitr
format:
  html
execute:
  echo: false
  include: true
  error: false
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: load-packages
library(tidyverse)
```

# Introduction

# Methods

# Results

# Discussion

# References
